ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
The regular context menu sometimes duplicates the context menu on the canvas, so it's disabled there by default.
There is a separate context menu for images directly on the canvas, but if that's not enough (for example for images in notes on canvas), you can enable the regular context menu here too.
ast.target: 常规上下文菜单有时会与画布上的上下文菜单重复，因此默认情况下在画布上禁用它。\n画布上的图片有一个单独的上下文菜单，但如果这还不够（例如画布上笔记中的图片），您也可以在此处启用常规上下文菜单。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Middle mouse click on image link to open in new tab
ast.target: 鼠标中键点击图片链接以在新标签页中打开

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Enable regular context menu on canvas
ast.target: 在画布上启用常规上下文菜单

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Failed copying image with original mimetype, using PNG fallback -
ast.target: 使用原始 mimetype 复制图片失败，使用 PNG 回退 -

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Failed copying image with PNG mimetype -
ast.target: 使用 PNG mimetype 复制图片失败 -
